block_00: Guide to affiliate marketing on TikTok
block_02: A huge part of IQ Option users are Millennials and Gen Z, which means a TikTok campaign can generate a ton of interest in the product you promote.
block_03: Let’s find out how you can use TikTok in your affiliate campaign.
block_05: Marketers can leverage TikTok in three main areas:
block_07: It will be especially effective if you want to open your content to a new audience. Collaborate with tiktokers who speak the language of your geos and have a large audience.
block_09: Making content for TikTok is not that difficult. Even if you don't have a large audience, TikTok algorithms can work wonders and showcase your video to a lot of people.
block_10: How to manipulate the TikTok algorithm for more views
block_11: Quality content. TikTok algorithms love videos with interesting plots, upbeat music, filters, etc.
block_12: High-resolution videos. Use modern gadgets to make sure your videos are clear, well-lit and without extraneous noise.
block_13: Publication frequency — at least 1 video per day.
block_14: Trendy videos. Check the feed regularly to keep abreast of all the new trends, and use popular music.
block_15: Interaction with other people's content. Like and comment on other tiktokers. The support of other users will return to you in the form of new subscribers.
block_16: Engaging videos. The algorithm appreciates videos that users watch to the end. Therefore, do not make the video too long and save the best for last.
block_17: Reposts in social networks. TikTok loves interacting with other social networks. If you share your video on Instagram and users like it, the platform will provide you with additional bonuses.
block_18: Uniqueness. Do not plagiarize or copy someone else's content — algorithms don't like it.
block_19: Hashtags. They help the algorithm to understand what your video is all about and what audience to show it to. The optimal quantity is 6-8 tags per video.
block_20: Challenges and collaborations with other tiktokers. This is a great opportunity to get into the "Recommendations". Another great way to expand your audience is to shoot videos with other bloggers.
block_21: Subs. This is how you “lure” traffic to your account from other geos.
block_22: Live broadcasts. Go live and cover interesting topics, answer questions, and share professional life hacks and tips.
block_23: Unfortunately, you can't just place a link in your TikTok videos. Instead, you need to include a link in your bio.
block_25: TikTok has its own advertising platform, TikTok For Business. There are several types of ads available, such as Top View Ads, In-Feed Ads, Branded Hashtag Ads, etc. We recommend buying traffic to your own resource rather than to IQ Option directly.
block_26: How much do TikTok ads cost?
block_27: TikTok advertising runs on a bidding system — you’re betting against other advertisers for specific placements and audiences. Normally, for Top View and In-Feed ads you must spend a minimum of $20 USD a day per ad group or $0.20 to $2 per action.
block_28: You can read more about starting off with TikTok Ads
block_31: Need more tips on TikTok advertising? Ask your manager!
